subparts.text: Explain the Fourier’s law of conduction. What does negative sign indicates in the formula.
Explain the Lumped heat analysis and significance of Biot number in that.
How the first law of thermodynamics applied to any Heat Exchanger? Which heat exchanger is having high irreversibility and how?
Discuss the critical thickness of insulation for cylinder and sphere and its significance.

Write down the generalized conduction equation and conduction equation with steady state and no heat generation. A steel pipe 10cm inner diameter and 11 cm outer diameter is covered with an insulation having thermal conductivity of 1 watt/mK, if the convective heat transfer coefficient between the surface of insulation & surrounding air is 8 watt/m2K, calculate the critical radius of insulation.

An iron plate of thickness L and thermal conductivity K is subjected to a constant heat flux Q w/m2. At the boundary surface at x=0 from the other boundary surface at x=L the heat is dissipated by convection into a fluid at Temperature T3 with a heat transfer coefficient h. For the following data, calculate T1 and T2. If L=2cm, K=20watt/mK, Q = 105 W/m2 T3= 50° C and h= 500Watt/m2K

A stainless steel tube of thermal conductivity 19 W/mK of a 2cm inner diameter and 5 cm outer diameter is insulated with 3cm thick asbestos of thermal conductivity 0.2 W/mk. Calculate heat transfer rate per unit length if temperature difference of inner and outermost surface is 600° C

A steel ball of diameter 60mm is initially in thermal equilibrium at 1030°C in a furnace. It is suddenly remove from the furnace & cooled in ambient air at 30°C with convective heat transfer coefficient of h= 20W/m2K . Thermophysical properties of steel are density= 7800kg/m3, K= 40W/mK, and Cp = 600 Joule/kg/K. Calculate time required in seconds to cool steel ball in air from 1030°C to 430°C.

In a food processing plant, a brine solution is heated from -12°C to - 65°C in parallel flow Heat Exchanger by water entering at 35°C and leaving at 20°C at the rate of 9kg/min. Determine the heat exchanger area for an overall heat transfer coefficient of 860 W/m2K. Cp for water is 4.86 * 103 J/kgK
Explain the significance of fins. Discuss about the efficiency and effectiveness of fins. What are the different cases of fins that are being used for Heat Transfer purpose.
